full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Writing the structured report synthesising all findings
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Help me structure a 4-page technical report synthesising reproduction, ablation, and failure mode findings from implementing Yu et al. 2011 CDdual.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Assisted in reading comprehension and identifying relevant sections of the paper. All final content was independently verified against the paper and rewritten in student's own words.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Cross-verified all claims directly against the relevant equations, sections, and theorems in Yu et al. 2011. No verbatim LLM-generated text was used in the submitted work.

top_5_prompts.prompt: Help me structure a 4-page technical report synthesising reproduction, ablation, and failure mode findings from implementing Yu et al. 2011 CDdual.
top_5_prompts.why_important: This was the primary interaction for Task 4.1 — it helped orient my reading of the paper toward the specific requirements of this task.

student_declaration.statement: I declare that this JSON file contains a complete and honest record of my LLM usage for Task 4.1.
